anti_patterns: Do not use before defining find
Avoid generated ids that change per build
Avoid localized text if id exists
Avoid non-exact text for short common words
Do not set exact when text is dynamic/localized
Avoid broad patterns like .*
Avoid brittle nth-child chains
Combine with text when role is duplicated
Avoid if placeholder disappears on focus
Avoid absolute deep hierarchy paths
Avoid when screen layout changes often
Avoid as primary selector

when_to_use: Canvas/graphics/Android Auto or no semantic selector
anti_patterns: Do not start with coordinates for normal app UI
Avoid screenshots that vary by theme/scale
Do not over-constrain before verifying screen size

when_to_use: Text visible in screenshot but absent from hierarchy
anti_patterns: Avoid when native text/id exists

when_to_use: Repeated list/card rows near stable anchor
anti_patterns: Avoid if anchor is not unique
Avoid if scrollUntilVisible can find semantic target
Avoid overly broad parent type
Do not use to hide real failures
Not a selector
